summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The First Trust RBA American Industrial Renaissance ETF (AIRR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund tracks a multifactor-selected index of equities that can benefit from potential regain in market share of US industrial and community banking sector. AIRR was launched on Mar 10, 2014 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: Richard Bernstein Advisors American Industrial Renaissance Index

holdings.infoBox: AIRR is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sterling Infrastructure stock at 5.00%, C.H. Robinson Worldwide at 4.86%, Comfort Systems USA at 4.08%, Saia, Inc. at 4.01%, and Owens Corning at 3.86%.
